title: Project Manager
description:
Job Description:

  • At least a Civil Engineering Degree or relevant discipline recognized bythe Professional Engineers Board of Singapore with a minimum 5 yearsrelevant experience in managing Civil Engineering projects.
  • Should also hold the Singapore Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ) Specialist Diploma in WSH (Construction Industry), or similar Qualifications and Experience acceptable to HDB.
  • Possess the Singapore Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ) Specialist Diploma in WSH (Construction Industry), or similar Qualifications and Experience acceptable to HDB.

Job Requirements:

  • To assist the Qualified Person (C&S) in coordinating and managing the designand construction.
  • To carry out site safety inspections, including taking photos of unsafe acts and conditions, and highlighting the relevant parties on immediate actions to be taken.
  • To maintain safety records, permits, incident logs, and follow-up documentation.  
  • To submit safety reports on all projects under the consultancy package.
  • To organize and participate in regular safety site walks and inspections with stakeholders.

Email: HR@sg.tylin.com

Submit resume with photo including current and expected salary and contact no. latest by 28 February 2026.

postedCompany.description:
T.Y. Lin International PTE LTD is multi award winning Singapore based multi-disciplinary engineering services firm. An affiliate office of T.Y. Lin International based in San Francisco, USA and a member of the internationally acclaimed Dar Al-Handasah Group. T.Y. Lin International has more than 2,500 professionals in 50 offices throughout the Americas and Asia.

The Singapore Office has been serving the engineering needs of Singapore and the Region for over forty years and we pride ourselves in our approach and our ability to deliver a consistently high quality of service to our clients.Our core business includes civil, structural, mechanical, electrical, geotechnical and railway engineering services from concept planning through to implementation, construction, operation and maintenance.

T.Y. Lin International has been instrumental in the delivery of a wide range of projects across Singapore and the Region including Mass Rapid Transit (MRT) stations and tunnels, highway projects and several bridges including Keppel Bay Bridge and Hledan Flyover, Myanmar, hotel/recreational complex developments such as Marina Bay Sands Integrated Resort, multiple complex and high rise building developments including The Interlace Condominium and many more.
postedCompany.name: T.Y.LIN INTERNATIONAL PTE. LTD.
